[6-10] The yellow ball rests inside the net beside a player in a red cap. A player in a white cap #2 points upward while a player in white cap #15 swims nearby. The yellow ball travels high near the pool deck edge marked "6FT-8IN" as spectators watch.
[10-14] The ball rests in the net again. A player in a dark blue cap #12 with a 'P' is near teammates in white caps with 'C' logos. The player in blue cap #12 pumps a fist. Finally, a player holds the yellow ball high near marker "1FT", surrounded by players in white caps with 'C' logos.

[14-16] A player in a dark blue cap holds a yellow ball high while a defender in a white cap guards closely. The scene transitions to players swimming vigorously, creating white splashes near the pool edge where a red cone and spectators' legs appear. [16-18] A yellow ball rests inside the white goal net while a player in a red cap floats nearby. Spectators sit on chairs along the pool deck. A player wearing a white cap with the number 11 raises their right arm high while swimming next to a player in a dark cap with red trim. [18-20] A player wearing a dark blue cap with red trim swims vigorously, generating significant white water spray with an upward arm extension. The scene transitions to a close-up of churning turquoise water and foam. [20-24] A swimmer in a dark blue cap swims freestyle. A player in a dark blue cap with a red stripe and 'R' holds a yellow ball high near a pool edge marked '7FT-0IN' while a defender in a white cap reaches toward them. The scene shifts to players swimming near the deck with spectators watching, finally showing the yellow ball resting inside the white goal net as a player in a red cap floats nearby facing the goal. [24-26] Players tread water in the turquoise pool near the deck edge with yellow markers. A swimmer in a dark blue cap numbered 23 is on the right. Nearby, a player in a white cap with a 'C' logo and a teammate in a dark blue cap numbered 3 cluster. Another player in a white cap floats left, while a player in a dark cap numbered 7 is visible in the background.

[28-30] A player in a red cap stands before a white goal frame with black netting, surrounded by splashing water as a yellow ball appears. He raises his right fist centrally in the turquoise water. [30-32] The red-capped player remains in goal near the ball. The view shifts to a player in a blue cap marked 'R' raising his right arm, surrounded by players in white and blue caps treading water near a deck labeled '7FT-0IN'. [32-34] The blue-capped player keeps his arm raised. Near the goal, the red-capped goalie raises both hands to block a white-capped player reaching for the yellow ball, which subsequently lands inside the black netting. [34-36] A player in a dark cap with red trim swims away from the camera while players in white caps with 'C' logos tread water nearby, with yellow lane markers in the background. [36-38] Several players tread water, including a white-capped player numbered 2 facing away, a white-capped player numbered 6 near a dark-capped player, and the blue-capped 'R' player looking toward the group.

[38-40] A white goal frame featuring 'anti' in red text spans the top, with a red bucket visible behind the black net. In the turquoise water, a player in a blue cap creates a large splash near the goal while a white cap appears in the bottom left. [40-42] A player in a dark blue cap numbered 12 lifts a yellow ball high while a defender in a white cap reaches upward; another player in a blue cap observes on the right before the scene transitions into heavy horizontal motion blur. [42-44] The blur clears to reveal players treading water near the deck where spectators sit. A player in a dark blue cap raises a right arm vertically, while a player in a white cap numbered 2 floats nearby and another extends an arm forward. [44-46] Players tread water near the concrete edge labeled "7FT-0IN" below a blue scoreboard showing a red "9". A player in a blue cap numbered 12 is central, surrounded by athletes in blue caps with red trim and white caps, including one numbered 8 looking right.

recent_thinks: [0-2] A player in a white cap appears on the left, creating heavy splashing. The yellow ball moves from the left edge to a central position near the disturbance. The initial foreground player in the blue cap is partially submerged in the spray. Two players in blue caps remain stationary in the background watching.

[26-28] The view moves to the pool deck where athletes in blue swim briefs and blue caps with white numbers gather. Some stand while others sit on chairs, including players wearing caps numbered 2, 6, and 22. Spectators sit in the background near a fence, with a blue cooler and red cone visible on the concrete.

[46-48] A yellow ball appears near the white crossbar labeled "anti" as a player in a dark blue cap reaches up with both arms to block. A player in a white cap numbered 11 watches from below while another in a blue cap numbered 9 observes left. Splashing occurs near the net, behind which a red bucket rests on the deck.

[48-50] The yellow ball rests inside the white goal net marked 'anti'. A player in a blue cap is near the goal mouth. In the foreground, a player wearing a dark cap numbered 15 faces right, while a player in a white cap numbered 19 treads water nearby. Another player in a white cap is visible to the left.

[50-52] A player in a blue cap numbered 4 lifts a yellow ball high while a player in a white cap reaches upward to block. The ball travels near the top corner of the white goal frame labeled 'anti' amidst splashing water. Another player in a white cap watches from the left.

[52-54] A player in a blue cap numbered 4 points an index finger upward while treading water. A player in a white cap floats nearby to the left. On the right, another athlete in a blue cap with red trim raises a hand near the deck marked '7FT-0IN'.

[54-56] Players tread water near the goal, including one in a dark cap numbered 15 and another in a white cap numbered 19. The goal frame displays red text. The scene shifts to a player in a blue cap lifting the yellow ball high near the net while a defender in white reaches upward amidst splashing water.

- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).
